markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.074 — Election Date

After receipt of a petition under Section 311.073 (Election After Petition) , the election shall be held on the first uniform election date prescribed by Section 41.001 (Uniform Election Dates) , Election Code, that allows sufficient time to comply with other requirements of law.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
